## Description
Please include a brief summary of the changes and the related issue (if any). List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing & Verification
How did you test and verify these changes?
- [ ] Unit tests run and pass locally
- [ ] Manual test run on device/emulator (please specify test setup)

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new compiler warnings
- [ ] I have updated the change log (if applicable)
